prose:
Method–provenance block (transparent, reproducible)

• Property: atom-condensed Fukui functions (electrophilic f⁺, nucleophilic f⁻) and dual descriptor; identification of the most electrophilic and nucleophilic atoms in pyridine.
• Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier “standard”), no density fitting, PySCF 2.x backend.
• Geometry provenance: single-point Fukui analysis on the user-supplied pyridine.xyz (no geometry optimization; notation Fukui//input xyz).
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
• Charge & multiplicity: neutral singlet parent (charge 0, multiplicity 1).  N + 1 and N – 1 states run as doublets (charge ±1, multiplicity 2).
• Convergence & caveats: SCF for all three charge states converged; integrity.trustworthy = true.
• Software: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (engine_subcommand “fukui”) invoking PySCF for DFT.
